title: FIFA Score Update: England Defeats France 6-4
description: Search interest for 'fifa score' is trending in Canada following reports of England's victory over France in a World Cup match.

sources.title: Saka's hat trick lifts England past Mbappé, France 6-4 in wild World Cup 3rd-place game
'Unhinged game': Sports fans react to England's thrilling win over France
England's bronze medal win over France was frustrating, here are four reasons why

sections.heading: Match Outcome
paragraphs: According to CBC, Saka scored a hat trick to lift England past France with a final score of 6-4. The outlet described the event as a wild World Cup third-place game.

sections.heading: Fan Reactions
paragraphs: Sportsnet.ca reports that sports fans reacted to England's thrilling win over France, characterizing the match as an 'unhinged game'.

sections.heading: Post-Match Analysis
paragraphs: DAZN reported that England's bronze medal win over France was frustrating. The source outlined four reasons explaining why the match was viewed this way.

faq.q: What was the final score between England and France?
faq.a: According to CBC, England defeated France with a score of 6-4.

faq.q: Who scored for England in the match?
faq.a: CBC reports that Saka achieved a hat trick during the game.

faq.q: What type of match was played?
faq.a: The game was identified by CBC as the World Cup third-place match.
